AppNotes: Run after fresh install: bash -c "sed -i '\$d' /app/www/public/config/config.php && echo '  '\''trusted_proxies'\'' => array (0 => '\''127.0.0.1'\''),, '''forwarded_for_headers'\'' => array (0 => '\''HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR'\''), '''overwriteprotocol'\'' => '\''https'\'', '''backgroundjobs_mode'\'' => '\''cron'\'', '''maintenance_window_start'\'' => '\''02:00'\'' );' >> /app/www/public/config/config.php && php /app/www/public/occ maintenance:mode --on && php /app/www/public/occ db:add-missing-indices && php /app/www/public/occ maintenance:repair --include-expensive && php /app/www/public/occ maintenance:mode --off"
